⚡ Efficiency Test — Cost Per Click ✓ Meta Wins
Meta
$1.10
Reddit
$1.90
Meta delivered 42% lower CPC than Reddit ($1.10 vs $1.90) while generating 303 landing page views vs Reddit's 221 link clicks — on nearly identical total spend ($424.97 vs $420.93). Meta also outperformed on CTR: 1.17% vs Reddit's 0.51%.
